title: Rhode Island Association of Disability Examiners (RIADE) — Constitution & By-Laws
description: Constitution and by-laws of the Rhode Island Association of Disability Examiners (RIADE), a NADE chapter in the Northeast Region serving members within Rhode Island. The constitution covers preamble, name, purpose, membership, limitations, officers (President, President-elect, Secretary-Treasurer), board of directors, an annual meeting in May, by-laws, and amendments; the by-laws detail the board of directors, finances/dues, officer duties, committees (Membership, Publications, Program, Constitution & By-laws, Education and Training), amendments, and rules of order.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Rhode Island (RIADE) Chapter
source.title: Rhode Island Association of Disability Examiners Constitution & By-Laws

notes: Authoritative: this is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source document Rhode-Island-Const-Bylaws.doc. The conversion duplicates the by-laws Committees/Amendments/Rules-of-Order articles (Article V section 3 onward repeats Articles VI-VII), an artifact of the original document; content is otherwise intact. One line erroneously expands NADE as 'National Association of Medical Examiners' (an original-document error, preserved). No adoption/revision date is stated, so temporal_coverage is omitted. Related to the NADE regional constitutions/bylaws link index.
